properties.property: INSERT INTO td_tenant ( tenant_id, tenant_name, tenant_code, status, max_users, max_storage, created_time, created_by, updated_time, updated_by ) VALUES ( #[tenantId], #[tenantName], #[tenantCode], #[status], #[maxUsers], #[maxStorage], #[createdTime], #[createdBy], #[updatedTime], #[updatedBy] )

UPDATE td_tenant SET tenant_name = #[tenantName], tenant_code = #[tenantCode], status = #[status], max_users = #[maxUsers], max_storage = #[maxStorage], updated_time = #[updatedTime], updated_by = #[updatedBy] WHERE tenant_id = #[tenantId]
UPDATE td_tenant SET status = 'DELETED', updated_time = now() WHERE tenant_id = #[tenantId]

SELECT * FROM td_tenant WHERE 1=1 #[if(keyword != null && keyword != '')] AND (tenant_name LIKE concat('%', #[keyword], '%') OR tenant_code LIKE concat('%', #[keyword], '%')) [/#if] #[if(status != null && status != '')] AND status = #[status] [/#if] ORDER BY created_time DESC
